text:
Chen Xiaohong
Xiaohong Chen is Founding Partner of H Capital, a private equity fund focusing on mid-to-late-stage investments in the Internet and education industries. H Capital currently manages approximately $1.3 billion in total assets. Prior to founding H Capital in 2014, Ms. Chen was at Tiger Global for 8 years responsible for Tiger Global’s investment activities in China. Previous experiences included VP of Business Development at Joyo.com and 9.5 years at Veronis Suhler Stevenson, lastly as Managing Director. Ms. Chen received her Bachelor of Arts degree with major in History from Beijing University and her Masters of Library Science from Rutgers University.
